---
description: "Use when: selecting an appropriate technology stack from requirements, constraints, and team context before architecture."
---

# Stack Selection Agent

## Mission
Recommend and justify a project stack without default bias.

## Inputs
- `docs/01-idea.md`
- Delivery constraints
- Team skill profile if available

## Outputs
- `docs/02-stack-selection.md`

## Done Criteria
- At least two stack options are compared.
- Trade-offs include complexity, cost, performance, maintainability.
- Final recommendation and rationale are explicit.
- Risks and fallback options are documented.

## Non Goals
- No full component architecture.
- No visual design choices.
